calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-20-2009 Judgment Entered

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Continued To Apr-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joseph Petrillo, Esq. for Appellant/Defendant SF Night Life, LLC with David Blackford.
Robin Reichert, Respondent/Plaintiff, appears in pro per.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

David Blackford testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant SF Night Life, LLC.

Robin Reichert testifies on his own behalf.

AT the conclusion of the hearing, the Court asks the parties to submit further briefings on the issue no later than Tuesday, April 14, 2009 at the Judge Pro Tem's business address. The matter will be deemed submitted thereon.

JPT Richard Wise, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (525)
